data.title: UK FCA Advances Cryptoasset Regulatory Framework
data.description: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) is advancing its regulatory framework for cryptoassets. According to NS3.AI, following consultations that conclude in December 2025, new legislation has been introduced to Parliament to support this regime. The framework is scheduled to begin on 25 October 2027. The FCA plans to establish a dedicated authorisation gateway for crypto businesses starting in September 2026.

data.title: Tom Lee Highlights Metals as Emerging Asset Class
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that Tom Lee from Fundstrat discussed the evolving perception of metal assets during a recent CNBC live broadcast. Lee emphasized that metals are being re-evaluated by the market and are increasingly recognized as a tangible asset class. Historically, gold was primarily favored by a niche group of investors, but over the past three years, its status has shifted significantly.

data.title: Binance: Users with at least 233 Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 14,600 XPIN tokens on a first-come, first-served basis.
data.description: Binance Alpha's second round of the XPIN Network (XPIN) airdrop rewards is now open. Users with at least 233 Binance Alpha Points can claim 14,600 XPIN tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the rewards are not all distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours, otherwise it will be considered as a forfeiture of the claim.

data.title: Backpack CEO: The Solana ecosystem has focused more on the financial infrastructure sector over the past year.
data.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Backpack CEO Armani Ferrante stated that the Solana ecosystem has focused more on a pragmatic area over the past year: financial infrastructure. Ferrante indicated he will be speaking at CoinDesk's Consensus conference in Hong Kong next month. "The network is increasingly being built around high-throughput on-chain transactions, market structures, and settlements—what people call the internet capital markets," Ferrante said. He added that while cryptocurrency prices remain sluggish and native cryptocurrency investors remain cautious, institutional investor interest in cryptocurrencies is high. The long-term prospects for Solana, and indeed the entire blockchain, depend on its role as a neutral settlement layer. In the future, assets such as stocks and derivatives will flow seamlessly between platforms in the form of standardized tokens, rather than being stored in isolated databases. As global finance moves more onto-chain, Solana will ultimately reap the rewards. (CoinDesk)

data.description:

data.title: Capital B updates its $356 million funding plan to increase its BTC holdings.
data.description: French listed company Capital B announced an update to its $356 million ATM-type capital increase plan in partnership with TOBAM, aimed at purchasing more BTC. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.description:
Australia's financial watchdog has raised concerns about gaps in cryptocurrency oversight, identifying them as a major worry for the coming months.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australia-crypto-gaps-threaten-safety/

data.title: UK FCA cryptoasset rules advance with 2027 start date and new consultations
data.description:
UK FCA cryptoasset rules are moving forward after December 2025 consultations and new legislation laid before Parliament. The regime is scheduled to start on 25 October 2027, with a dedicated authorisation gateway expected from September 2026.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/uk-fca-cryptoasset-rules-advance-2027-start-date

data.title: Hang Seng's Gold ETF Set for Hong Kong Listing with Ethereum Tokenization
data.description:
Hang Seng to list tokenized gold ETF on Hong Kong Stock Exchange using Ethereum blockchain. Key players include HSBC as custodian and tokenization agent.
source: https://coincu.com/news/hang-seng-tokenized-gold-etf/

data.title: Binance has experienced a large outflow of funds over the past seven days, indicating that funds are simultaneously withdrawing from both "cash" and "assets".
data.description: CryptoOnchain posted on social media that Binance experienced a large outflow of funds over the past 7 days, with stablecoins and mainstream assets being transferred out of the platform on a massive scale. Specifically: USDT (ERC20) saw a net outflow of approximately $2.26 billion, USDC approximately $1.24 billion, BTC approximately $2.14 billion, and ETH approximately $1.35 billion. This indicates that funds are simultaneously withdrawing from both "cash" and "assets." While selling pressure may have decreased, buying power within the exchange is also weakening. Liquidity contraction often foreshadows potentially increased volatility, and price discovery may rely more on external fund flows than on Binance's platform.

data.title: Ondo Finance Appoints Matthieu de Vergnes as Global Institutional Business Managing Director
data.description: Ondo Finance has announced the appointment of Matthieu de Vergnes as the Managing Director of Global Institutional Business. According to Foresight News, de Vergnes previously worked at McKinsey & Company, where he served as a partner leading capital markets and investment banking operations.

data.title: Kalshi Opens Washington Office to Step Up US Lobbying Efforts
data.description:
Kalshi has opened a Washington office and hired seasoned policy veterans to deepen engagement with federal and state regulators.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kalshi-opens-washington-office-to-step-up-us-lobbying-efforts/

data.title: Infrared to Operate as Validator for Greenlane's Digital Asset Vault
data.description: Infrared, a staking protocol within the Berachain ecosystem, has announced its role as a validator operator for Greenlane's digital asset vault. According to Foresight News, a portion of the BERA tokens accumulated by the vault will be staked using Infrared's infrastructure, generating revenue through its validators. Greenlane plans to deploy up to 30 million BERA tokens to support validator operations on the Berachain network. Initially, Greenlane will join Infrared's validator pool with two validators.

data.title: Meta trials new paid subscriptions across Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp
data.description:
Meta announced Monday it will begin testing new paid subscription options across its major platforms in the coming months. Users will get access to enhanced features and artificial intelligence tools while basic services stay free. The social media company said that subscribers can access features designed to boost productivity and creativity, plus expanded AI capabilities. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/meta-expands-revenue-push/

data.title: Kimi K2.5 Model Achieves Top Scores in Global Open Source Evaluations
data.description:
Kimi has announced the release of its first-generation open-source model, Kimi K2.5, through its official WeChat account. According to Foresight News, Kimi K2.5 has achieved the highest scores among global open-source models in various agent evaluations, including HLE (Human Last Examination), BrowseComp, and DeepSearchQA.

The K2.5 model is designed with a native multimodal architecture, supporting both visual and text inputs. It integrates capabilities such as visual understanding and reasoning, programming, and agent functionalities into a single model. The release and open-sourcing of the Kimi K2.5 model introduce new capabilities in visual comprehension, coding, and agent clustering.

data.title: Crypto Address Places $23,000 Bet on Federal Reserve Interest Rate Decision
data.description: A newly established cryptocurrency address has placed a $23,000 wager on the potential outcomes of the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision scheduled for January 28. According to NS3.AI, the bet encompasses three possible scenarios: an interest rate hike of 25 basis points or more, a rate cut of 25 basis points, and a rate cut of 50 basis points or more. Should any of these scenarios materialize, the potential profits could range from $1.27 million to $5.64 million.

data.title: Binance: The Binance Alpha airdrop can be claimed at 17:00 today. The airdrop threshold is 233 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available today at 17:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 233 Binance Alpha Credits are eligible to claim the tokens. It's on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is depleted or the event ends. Further details will be announced separately. Please follow Binance's official channels for the latest updates on the specific airdrop tokens.

data.title: An address spent $23,000 betting on extreme volatility in the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision, with a potential profit of up to $5.64 million.
data.description: Lookonchain posted on its X platform that the market expects the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates unchanged on January 28th. Against this backdrop, a newly created address spends $23,000 to bet on three extreme scenarios: a 25 basis point or greater rate hike, a 25 basis point or greater rate cut, and a 50 basis point or greater rate cut. If any of these scenarios occur, the address will profit over $1.27 million, over $2.01 million, or up to $5.64 million respectively.
